articles.author: Hallie Golden
articles.title: Large tornado downs trees and power lines in Illinois county - AP News
articles.description: Officials say several tornadoes have torn through parts of Illinois and Indiana, downing trees and power lines in an area south of Chicago and overwhelming the 911 center with emergency calls. The Kankakee County Sheriff’s Office says a tornado struck down ne…
articles.content: Several tornadoes tore through parts of Illinois and Indiana Tuesday, downing trees and power lines in an area south of Chicago and overwhelming the 911 center with emergency calls, according to offi… [+1876 chars]
